note: A quiet move leaves the opponent with pieces but no legal move, producing a win.
migration_update_note: Initial Draughts Lite Trace Schema v1 fixture; expected hashes are established by GAT7DRALITCOM-014.

expected_private_view_hashes.not_applicable: draughts_lite is perfect-information and has no private-view API.

not_applicable.hidden_information: draughts_lite is perfect-information and has no hidden state to redact.
not_applicable.stochastic_game_events: draughts_lite game rules use no randomness; bot RNG is recorded only in bot traces.
not_applicable.preview_hashes: draughts_lite uses action-tree metadata and semantic effects rather than a separate preview hash surface in Gate 7.
